en.project_1_title: OpenCart Upgrade Project - Fuel Cell Store
en.project_1_desc1: Led the migration of the company's e-commerce platform from OpenCart 1.5.6.4 to 3.0.3.8, covering 2,000+ SKUs and 70,000+ historical orders with zero data loss and zero business interruption.
en.project_1_desc2: Independently wrote complex SQL migration scripts to handle data cleaning, field mapping, and relationship rebuilding across version differences, ensuring historical data integrity and consistency.
en.project_1_desc3: Refactored frontend code architecture to improve page load performance and mobile responsiveness; resolved multiple third-party module compatibility issues, significantly improving system stability and user conversion rate.
en.project_2_title: Internal ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) System - Fuel Cell Store
en.project_2_desc1: Independently designed and developed a comprehensive internal ERP system covering order tracking, shipment monitoring, inventory management, and multi-dimensional business reporting to support cross-department daily operations.
en.project_2_desc2: Built a unified data dashboard integrating orders, inventory, and shipment data to enable one-stop business metrics visualization, significantly improving management decision-making efficiency.
en.project_2_desc3: Implemented fully automated report generation and scheduled analytics tasks, reducing manual reporting workload by approximately 80%.
en.project_2_desc4: Ensured data security through cron-based automated backup mechanisms, with system recovery time reduced to minutes.
en.project_3_desc1: Independently designed and built a full-stack inventory management system from scratch, covering stock level tracking, supplier management, and full purchase order lifecycle management to support daily business operations.
en.project_3_desc2: Designed a multi-dimensional real-time analytics dashboard integrating inventory turnover, stock aging, and demand forecasting metrics to provide management with data-driven replenishment decisions.
en.project_3_desc3: Implemented intelligent reorder alert mechanisms triggered by historical sales data and safety stock thresholds.
en.project_3_desc4: Deeply integrated with the ERP system for real-time inventory data sync, reducing stockout rate to near zero.

zh.project_1_title: 燃料电池商店电商网站升级项目
zh.project_1_desc1: 主导公司电商平台从OpenCart 1.5.6.4升级至3.0.3.8，涵盖2,000+ SKU及70,000+历史订单完整迁移，实现零数据丢失、零业务中断。
zh.project_1_desc2: 针对跨版本数据结构差异，独立编写复杂SQL迁移脚本，处理数据清洗、字段映射与关联关系重建，保障历史数据完整性与一致性。
zh.project_1_desc3: 重构前端代码架构，提升页面加载性能与移动端适配性；解决多个第三方模块兼容性问题，系统稳定性与用户转化率显著提升。
zh.project_2_title: 燃料电池商店ERP系统设计与实现
zh.project_2_desc1: 独立设计并开发企业内部ERP系统，核心模块涵盖订单追踪、发货监控、库存管理及多维度业务报表，支撑多部门日常协作与运营管理。
zh.project_2_desc2: 构建统一数据仪表盘，整合订单、库存、发货等核心业务数据，实现一站式经营指标可视化，管理层决策效率大幅提升。
zh.project_2_desc3: 实现全自动化报表生成与定时分析任务，减少人工统计工作量约80%。
zh.project_2_desc4: 通过cron定时备份机制保障数据安全，系统异常恢复时间缩短至分钟级。
zh.project_3_title: 燃料电池商店库存系统设计与实现
zh.project_3_desc1: 从零独立设计并实现全栈库存管理系统，覆盖库存水平追踪、供应商管理、采购订单全生命周期管理等核心模块，支撑公司日常业务运营。
zh.project_3_desc2: 设计多维度实时分析看板，集成库存周转率、库龄分析、需求预测等关键指标，为管理层提供数据驱动的补货决策依据。
zh.project_3_desc3: 实现智能补货预警机制，依据历史销售数据与安全库存阈值自动触发提醒。
zh.project_3_desc4: 与ERP系统深度集成实现库存数据实时同步，将缺货率降低至接近零。
